_publications._publicationTitle: Stepwise crosstalk between aberrant Nf1, Tp53 and Rb signalling pathways induces gliomagenesis in zebrafish.

_contextSnippet: the proportions of malignant gliomas (grade III or IV) in rb1;tp53 cKO and nf1;tp53 cKO fish (18/30 and 24/30) were much higher than those in nf1;rb1 cKO and nf1 KO fish
details: 24/30 tumors were malignant gliomas (grade III or IV), much higher than nf1 KO fish (8/30)
